武器も返すよ、ほら。: Here, you can have your weapons back too.
盗賊団だ。すごい数だな……: It's the bandits. Quite a lot of them...
あいつらのアジトを見張る為に、ここで野営してるってわけ。: That's why I'm camping here, to keep an eye on their hideout.
寝床は堅いし、お風呂にもあまり入れないし……: The bed is hard, and I can't really take a bath...
それにこの辺、たまにトカゲとかヘビとか出るんですよね。<br>爬虫類が苦手な私と:
Plus, lizards and snakes show up around here sometimes. As someone
who's not a fan of reptiles, it's hard to relax, you know?
それに食事がねー。<br>あまり街に近づけないんで、堅いパンと干し肉ばかり……:
And the food... Since I can't get close to town, it's just hard bread
and dried meat all the time.
あーもう！ レストランに行きたーい、ふかふかのベッドで惰眠を貪りたーい！<br>:
Ah, screw this! I want to go to a restaurant, I want to sleep in a
fluffy bed! Screw this job!
それで、その魔法警官が俺たちを捕まえた理由は？: So then, why did you catch us?
あなたたちに用があったわけじゃないんですよー。<br>ただ、あの盗賊団が数日後に:
It's not like I had business with you all. It's just that those bandits
have a big deal coming up in a few days.
あいつらがこの大穴で盗掘した値打ちものの魔石や遺物と、:
The valuable magic stones and artifacts they dug up from the Abyss,
and...
武器商人が用意した、１０億ゴールド相当の魔導爆石を<br>交換する……って情報を:
...the arms dealer has prepared magic explosive stones worth 10
billion gold to exchange—that's the intel I got.
１０億ゴールド相当の取引か……そいつはすごいな。: A deal worth 10 billion gold... That's huge.
ですですー。あそこで君たちに盗賊を捕まえさせるわけには<br>いかなかったんで、:
That's right. Since I couldn't let you guys capture the bandits over
there, I had to interfere.
そういうわけで、取引が終わるまで私と行動を共にしてください。<br>捜査にご協力:
So, I need you to stick with me until the deal is done. I'm asking for
your cooperation on this investigation, okay?
いや、それだとちょっとまずいかもな。: No, that might be a problem.
俺は前線基地の司令官だ。: I'm the Commander of the Frontline Base.
……え？<br>司令官……って、前線基地の統率役の？: ...What? Commander... as in the one in charge of the Frontline Base?
ああ。俺が行方をくらませたとなると、部下が徹底して行方を追い始める。<br>ここ:
Yeah. If it gets out I've gone missing, my men will search thoroughly.
It's only a matter of time before soldiers swarm this place.
それは……困ったことになりましたねぇ……: Well... that's a problem, isn't it...
ペルディオン本国に応援要請をかけていて、取引当日に<br>腕利きの警察本隊が到着:
I've sent a request for reinforcements to Perdion proper. A skilled
police squad is scheduled to arrive on the day of the deal.
それまでは事を荒立てられちゃ困るんだよなあ～。: So until then, I can't have things getting stirred up, you know.
シェリルが手引きしたペルディオン警察が取引現場に踏み込み、<br>盗賊団と武器商:
So the plan was for the Perdion police, with you as their guide, to
raid the deal and catch the bandits and arms dealer in one go, right?
はい。ついでにいえば、魔導爆石はペルディオン警察から盗まれたもので、<br>それ:
Yes. And on top of that, the magic explosive stones were stolen from
the Perdion police, so I'm also supposed to recover them safely.
ただでさえ厄介な任務なのに、<br>魔導爆石を取り戻すっていう任務が追加されちま:
As if this mission wasn't tough enough, now you've got the extra job
of recovering the magic explosive stones. That's rough.
そうなんだ～。もー、人使い荒くていやになっちゃいますよー。<br>公僕は仕事を断:
Yeah... Geez, they work us to the bone. It's just awful. Being a public
servant means you can't refuse work, so it's tough.
とはいえ、魔導の力で大爆発を引き起こせる魔導爆石が危険物であることは<br>間違:
Still, there's no doubt that a magic explosive stone that can cause a
huge explosion is dangerous. We can't just leave it alone.
ペルディオン警察にとっても大きな任務だな。<br>それを任されるんだから、シェリ:
It's a major mission for the Perdion police too. Since they trusted you
with it, you must be pretty capable.
お？ 分かっちゃいます？<br>さすがに司令官、人を見る目がありますね～。:
Oh? Can you tell? As expected of the Commander, you've got a keen
eye for people.
判断力も高いが、さっきの銃の腕前もそうだ。<br>一歩間違えば大怪我するところを:
You've got good judgment, your shooting skills proved it. One wrong
move and we could've been badly hurt, but everyone got minor injuries.
ふっふ～～ん♪ そうでしょう、そうでしょう。<br>この魔法銃だって、銃の腕前を:
Fufuun!♪ That's right, that's right. Even this magic gun was given to
me because of my shooting skills, you know.
射撃の腕はペルディオンでもトップクラス！<br>勲章だって、何度も貰っちゃってる:
My shooting skills are top-class even in Perdion! I've gotten medals
plenty of times, you know! Ahem!
とはいえ、性格はあまり警察むきじゃなさそうだな。: Still, your personality doesn't seem very suited for police work.
あはは～、分かっちゃいます？ 本当はゆるく生きたいのに、<br>警察組織は規律が:
Ahaha, you can tell? I really want to take it easy, but the police
organization is strict and tough, you know...
あーあ、仕事なんかしないで、楽に生きていきたいなー。: Ugh, I wish I didn't have to work and could just take it easy.
警察官がそんなことを言っていていいのですか……？: Is it okay for a police officer to say things like that...?
いやー、だってですよ？ 警察官である私が暇であるということは、<br>世界が平和:
Think about it, right? If a police officer is idle, that means world
peace. The ideal world is one where I can slack off!
厳しい規律が性に合わないってのは、俺も同意だな。<br>三大国は歴史が長いぶんし:
I agree that strict discipline isn't for me. The Three Great Nations
have a long history, so many constraints and irrational rules.
ですよねー！<br>司令官、気が合うじゃないですかー。: Right? Commander, we really get along, don't we?
その点、前線基地は割と自由だぞ。: In that regard, the Frontline Base is pretty free.
ほほーう？ それはなんとも羨ましいですねー。: Oho? That's quite enviable, isn't it?
あの、司令官。暢気に話し込んでいる場合ではないと思いますが……。: Um, Commander. I don't think this is the time for idle chat...
ああ、そうだな。このまま俺たちがここにいると、<br>シェリルにとっても都合が悪:
Ah, right. If we keep staying here, it'll be troublesome for Cheryl as
well.
ええ。司令官を探して前線基地の兵士たちがここに集まると、<br>取引自体が流れる:
Yes. If soldiers from the Frontline Base come here looking for you,
Commander, there's a risk the whole deal could fall through.
ですが～、逆にいえば……: But then again, on the flip side...
俺が基地に戻って兵士たちの指揮を執って、<br>取引現場の鎮圧に協力することもで:
I can go back to the base, take charge of the soldiers, and cooperate
in suppressing the deal location.
いや～、話が早くて助かります～。: Well, you're quick on the uptake—that helps.
もちろん異論はない。協力しよう。<br>それで、取引の日程は？: Of course, I have no objections. I'll help. So, when's the deal?
２日後の正午からです。場所はこのアジトの北の草原、<br>尖った岩が目印ですー。:
Noon, two days from now. The location is the grassland north of this
hideout—look for a pointed rock as a landmark.
了解した。必ず応援を送る。<br>……それじゃ、俺たちはさっそく基地に戻ろう。:
Understood. I'll make sure to send reinforcements. ...Alright, let's
head back to the base now.
了解しました！<br>ではシェリルさん、また２日後に！: Understood! Then, Cheryl, see you in two days!
……さ～てと、私は盗賊団の張り込みを続けますか～: ...Well then, I suppose I'll continue the stakeout on the bandits.
どうしたんです、司令官？ 何か気になることでも？: What's wrong, Commander? Is there something bothering you?
（あー、めんどうくさい……。<br>これが終わったら休暇を貰って、ゆっくりバカン:
(Ah, what a pain... After this is over, maybe I'll take a vacation and go
on a relaxing trip somewhere...)
えー！ 盗賊団が移動し始めてる！<br>どういうこと～？:
What! The bandits are starting to move!
What's going on?
まさか……取引が前倒しになったんじゃ！？: No way... Did the deal get moved up?
もしそうなら、前線基地からの増援も、<br>ペルディオンの本隊到着も間に合わない:
If that's the case, then the reinforcements from the Frontline Base
and the Perdion main force won't arrive in time!
このままでは……作戦が失敗する……！: At this rate... the operation is going to fail...!
